$comment: Plugin marketplaces Brain2V auto-installs at setup. The organiser (/obs-organiser via knowledge/obs-plugin-routing.md) decides when each is actually used. Entries with verified:false have slugs that must be confirmed on first install — the installer tries them and reports failures instead of aborting.
